ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "product_asin" TEXT /* ASIN (Amazon Standard Identification Number) of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category ID of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand name of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the product was added to the system */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the product details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_location" TEXT /* Location of the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_bio" TEXT /* A brief bio of the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_rating" TEXT /* Average rating given by the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_reviews_count" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews written by the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_join_date" TEXT /* Date when the reviewer joined the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer who wrote the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the reviewer (e.g., ★★★★★, ★★★★) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "review_type" TEXT /* Type of review (e.g., Positive, Negative, Neutral) */,
  "sentiment_score" TEXT /* Sentiment score of the review (e.g., -1 to 1) */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  "unhelpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review unhelpful */,
  "review_images" TEXT /* URLs of images attached to the review */,
  "is_verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is from a verified purchase */,
  "review_source" TEXT /* Source of the review (e.g., website, mobile app) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_review_rating FOREIGN KEY ("review_rating") REFERENCES ratings ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_review_type FOREIGN KEY ("review_type") REFERENCES review_types ("review_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_types" (
  "review_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review type */,
  "review_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the review type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "rating_name" TEXT /* Name of the rating (e.g., ★★★★★, ★★★★) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, customer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the review */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the review */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the review */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for tracking user sessions */,
  "action" TEXT /* Detailed action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
